# Meeting Notes

Notes and decisions from coaching sessions and relevant follow-up conversations.


## 26.03.2026 Coaching Session

Topics:

* Review of target users and project direction.
* Discussion of whether the personas fit the AircraftVerse dataset and dashboard idea.

Feedback:

* The personas should be more specific than general data science students or
  lecturers interested in aviation.
* A better target group would be aviation students, because the dashboard could
  support learning in an aviation-related subject.
* We should validate this direction by talking to aviation students or aviation
  lecturers.

Decisions and follow-up:

* We changed the personas to aviation students and aviation lecturers / teaching
  assistants.
* We talked to two aviation students after the coaching session.
* One student shared PowerPoint slides from their current school material.
* Another student said the project would fit the subject "Principles of Flight".
* Based on this, we kept the dashboard focused on aircraft design trade-offs as a
  learning-oriented exploration tool.
